archetype: Pastel & Soft (Dark Mode Adaptation for ADHD)

rules: No Inter or standard sterile SaaS fonts.
Headings use tight tracking to hold attention without floating.
Body text uses increased line-height (leading-relaxed) for cognitive ease and readability.
Use high contrast text colors, avoiding gray-on-gray completely.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Progressive disclosure and hyper-clarity. Max 3 primary actions per screen to prevent 'analysis paralysis'.

bento_grid.hero_span: col-span-full md:col-span-2 lg:col-span-3 (Big START FOCUS CTA)

components.cards: bg-[#2A2438] rounded-3xl p-6 md:p-8 border border-[#3A3249]/50 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.12)]
components.buttons: rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-bold transition-transform active:scale-95

surfaces_and_micro_themes.dashboard_cards: Soft Neumorphic/Claymorphic logic. Thick rounded borders (rounded-3xl). No sharp corners anywhere. Deep warm background with soft inner glows on hover.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.focus_timer: Immersive 'Breathing Circle' mode. Extreme minimalism, everything else fades away to leave just the timer and a calming pulsing orb.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.glassmorphism: Used minimally for sticky headers (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#1A1625]/80) with a 1px border-[#3A3249].

rules: Avoid auto-play videos, infinitely looping chaotic animations, or fast flashes.
Use subtle, short (<0.3s) micro-interactions for button presses to confirm action (dopamine hit).
Breathing animation in focus mode must be slow, rhythmic (e.g., 4s inhale, 4s hold, 6s exhale).

adhd_specific_patterns.cognitive_load: Limit today's task list to EXACTLY 3 items (The Rule of 3). Hide the rest behind a 'Brain Dump' or 'More Tasks' accordion.
adhd_specific_patterns.forgiveness_mechanisms: 'Grace Days' for streaks. If a user misses a day, the streak freezes instead of resetting to 0 (prevents demoralization).
adhd_specific_patterns.gamification: Frequent, low-friction micro-rewards. XP for just checking in. Confetti on task completion (with toggle to disable).
adhd_specific_patterns.body_doubling: Live participant count with soft glowing pulsing avatars to create a sense of silent accountability without social pressure.
adhd_specific_patterns.low_stimulus_mode: Include a toggle for 'High Contrast / Low Stimulus' that reduces UI colors to greyscale with yellow CTAs.

images.description: 3D cute floating blob character mascot, soft pastel purple and warm yellow, to be used in dashboard as the personal focus companion.
images.placement: Dashboard header, focus mode idle screen, and settings profile.

images.description: Set of 3D gamification badges (flame, star, shield) in soft pastel colors.
images.placement: Progress/Rewards page, Streak indicator on Dashboard.

images.description: Abstract gradient mesh with deep warm charcoal and soft glowing pastel orbs.
images.placement: Hero section of landing page, or as a very subtle background for the 'Focus Mode' fullscreen timer.

component_instructions.shadcn_overrides: Override Shadcn's default 'Card' and 'Button' components. Change standard border-radius to `rounded-3xl` for cards and `rounded-full` for buttons. Remove sharp 1px borders in favor of soft ambient shadows or slightly lighter surface colors.
component_instructions.testing: All interactive elements MUST include `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid="start-focus-btn"`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Nunito font for all text to create a soft, non-intimidating 'warm hug' feel.
Implement the Dashboard with extreme focus: The 'START FOCUS' CTA must be massive and unmissable. Display only 3 tasks max.
In the Gamification logic, implement 'Grace Days' - do not punish users for missing a day.
Ensure all colors map precisely to the provided palette. Do not use generic tailwind slate or zinc for the background; use the specific #1A1625 deep warm charcoal.
